faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Harrison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Harrison typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F to kill all bed bugs and eggs in one session, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide residual protection. Our technician will recommend the best option during your inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide bed bug treatment in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service in Harrison for urgent bed bug situations. After your initial inspection, most treatments can be scheduled within 24-48 hours to quickly eliminate your infestation.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Harrison home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours during the process. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying away for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.
